title: open_file success output
description: Success confirmation that the target file was opened and became the focused, active file. Identical shape across all recognised file types.

opened.description: Resolved vault-relative path of the file that was opened (canonicalised from whichever locator the caller supplied).

vault.description: Echoed requested vault display name (the focused vault the open landed in).

new_tab.description: The effective new-tab flag applied to the open.
